# Omytea-Almighty repository instructions

Read [`ORG-SYNC.md`](../ORG-SYNC.md) before editing or publishing. The canonical
remote is `Omytea-Almighty/omytea-personal-console`. Automatic synchronization is only for
already-created, reviewed commits. Never stage or commit dirty work, rewrite
history, force-push, delete refs, change visibility, bypass existing hooks, or
bypass a curated-public release receipt. Any gate uncertainty fails closed as
`BLOCKED_*` while the local commit remains intact.
